description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden cargo bed with vertical plank sides and reinforced wooden framing. The cart is supported by four large, spoked wooden wheels, each attached to the sides for stability and mobility. The upper edges of the cart are lined with simple wooden side rails, providing additional containment for transported goods. The load platform is flat and solid, constructed from wide wooden planks, and the open top allows for easy loading and unloading. The handles are integrated into the frame at both ends, allowing the cart to be pushed or pulled from either direction. The overall appearance is rustic, with a weathered wood texture and dark metal or wooden fastenings.
description: A rustic wooden handcart with four large spoked wheels, side rails, and a flat plank cargo bed. The open-top design and sturdy frame make it suitable for transporting goods.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handcart, four large spoked wheels, and the wooden side rails.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open end, flat plank load platform, and the dual side rails extending forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wheels and side rails.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open cargo area, flat platform, and the rear side rails.
